title: Senior Software Engineer - Wipro Capital India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Wipro Capital India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
We at Wipro Capital India are looking for an experienced Senior Software Engineer based out of Ghaziabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Wipro Capital India:
Wipro Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wipro Capital India!
